scenarios.scenario: Rep reads a restricted lead directly via /leads/[id] URL (existence leak)
scenarios.rationale: getLead folds visibilityCondition into its WHERE and returns null for a barred read; callers throw error(404). No redacted view, no 403 — identical to a nonexistent id. (Query-layer proof in leads-db.spec AC#8; browser-render half is the e2e-auth-bootstrap Known-Gap.)

scenarios.scenario: Missed wiring on one read surface silently leaks restricted leads
scenarios.rationale: All 7 read fns explicitly wired and enumerated; SPEC-exempt surfaces (unassigned x2, reports, nav unassigned sub-count, listPipelineLeads) carry code comments. listPipelineLeads' only caller /team is manager-gated (error 403).

scenarios.scenario: Manager override fails to bypass restriction on some surface
scenarios.rationale: Override centralized in visibilityCondition -> sql`true` for role manager; every wired surface pushes the same helper. Pure-fn test asserts manager => literal 'true'. (Row-level manager-sees-all proven by Hybrid gates AC#9/#10 when DB present.)

scenarios.scenario: Stale grant rows keep a rep's access after visibility changes away from selected, or after owner change
scenarios.rationale: updateLead deletes-then-reinserts grants for selected and deletes all grants for non-selected, in-transaction. Every owner-change path (claim/unclaim/reassign) deletes all grants + resets visibility='everyone' in-transaction. Grant EXISTS subquery cannot match a deleted row.

scenarios.scenario: Migration reduces visibility for existing rows (hides leads that were visible)
scenarios.rationale: Column added NOT NULL DEFAULT 'everyone' — Postgres backfills all existing rows to everyone atomically, the most-permissive scope. No existing lead becomes hidden.

scenarios.scenario: Grant target id from a seeded non-RFC UUID is rejected, breaking selected-visibility
scenarios.rationale: selectedUserIds uses shape-only LOOSE_UUID_RE (not z.string().uuid()), matching ownerUpdateSchema, so seeded fixed-format user ids (00000000-...-000N) are accepted.
